notes: BLOCKED: chathamhouse.org is fully behind Cloudflare — direct curl, /sitemap.xml, /rss/*, /topics/artificial-intelligence and web_fetch all returned 403 / 'Attention Required' challenge pages. Chatham House's dedicated AI/digital research index could not be reached without triggering the Cloudflare challenge. Left all arrays empty per no-fabrication rule. Retry suggestion: a JS-capable/browser-automation fetch of chathamhouse.org/about-us/our-departments or the artificial-intelligence topic page, or an authenticated/allowlisted fetch path.
